description: Base schema shared by all InsightTracker versions. Defines the top-level envelope (apiVersion, kind, metadata, spec). Version-specific schemas extend this via allOf + $ref.

apiVersion.description: Schema version discriminant. Use 'journium.app/v0Beta' for all new trackers. The value must match exactly — the root schema uses this field to select the correct version-specific validator.

kind.description: Resource kind. Always 'InsightTracker'. Do not use the analysis type name here.

metadata.description: Tracker identity and display information. These fields appear in the Journium UI and in LLM prompt context.

name.description: Unique machine-readable identifier for this tracker within the application. Must be kebab-case lowercase alphanumeric (e.g. 'weekly-checkout-funnel', 'trial-to-paid-conversion', 'd30-retention'). Used in API calls and as a stable reference key — changing it creates a new tracker.

displayName.description: Human-friendly title shown in the Journium UI and included in LLM prompt context (e.g. 'Weekly Checkout Funnel', 'D30 Retention by Cohort'). Should clearly communicate what the tracker measures.

description.description: One or two sentences explaining what this tracker measures and why it matters (e.g. 'Tracks drop-off through the checkout funnel to identify the step with the highest friction each week.'). Shown in the UI and passed to the LLM as context.

spec.description: Full tracker specification including trigger, data window, analysis query, LLM config, and privacy settings. Defined in the version-specific schema (spec structure varies by apiVersion).
